mapper.select: SELECT #{settleDate} AS settle_date, o.op_type, COUNT(1) AS order_count, SUM(o.goods_total_amt + o.delivery_total_amt) AS total_sales_amt, SUM(o.goods_total_amt) AS total_goods_amt, SUM(o.discount_total_amt) AS total_discount_amt, SUM(o.vat_total_amt) AS total_vat_amt, SUM(o.pay_total_amt) AS total_pay_amt, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN o.vat_total_amt = 0 THEN o.goods_total_amt ELSE 0 END) / SUM(o.goods_total_amt) * 100, 2), 0) AS raw_material_ratio, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN o.vat_total_amt > 0 THEN o.goods_total_amt ELSE 0 END) / SUM(o.goods_total_amt) * 100, 2), 0) AS processed_ratio FROM TB_ORDER o WHERE DATE_FORMAT(o.reg_dt, '%Y%m%d') = #{settleDate} AND o.use_yn = 'Y' AND o.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY o.op_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SETTLEMENT ( settle_date, op_type, order_count, total_sales_amt, total_goods_amt, total_discount_amt, total_vat_amt, total_pay_amt, raw_material_ratio, processed_ratio, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{settleDate}, #{opType}, #{orderCount}, #{totalSalesAmt}, #{totalGoodsAmt}, #{totalDiscountAmt}, #{totalVatAmt}, #{totalPayAmt}, #{rawMaterialRatio}, #{processedRatio}, NOW() )
